name: Roy Buchanan
abstract: Leroy "Roy" Buchanan (September 23, 1939 – August 14, 1988) was an American guitarist and blues rock musician. A pioneer of the "Telecaster sound", Buchanan worked as a sideman and as a solo artist, with two gold albums early in his career and two later solo albums that made it to the Billboard chart.

concerts.label: American Guitar Heroes: Genuine House-Rockin' Music: Roy Buchanan/Lonnie Mack/Albert Collins

about_quotes.speaker: David Spinozza
about_quotes.evidence: And Link would listen to like Roy Buchanan, James Burton who played with Elvis Presley, there were guys that played that certain style.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Spinozza interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, NY, September 27, 2025
